name: unifi-network
description: UniFi Network MCP server — manage network devices, clients, firewall, VPN, and more

interface.shortDescription: Manage UniFi Network devices, clients, firewall, VPN, and WiFi

defaultPrompt: Set up UniFi Network MCP for Codex
